title: Omnibus X – and how it impacts biocontrol [Promoted Content]
summary_full: The Food and Feed Safety Omnibus X addresses ten different regulations. Among these is the plant protection products (PPPs) legislation EC Regulation No 1107/2009, which covers the placing on the market of all PPPs, both conventional and biocontrol. Biocontrol PPPs include microbials, semiochemicals, and natural substances such as plant extracts, minerals and peptides. While they […]
